channel.title: Marketing Ops on 爱折腾的工程师
channel.description: Recent content in Marketing Ops on 爱折腾的工程师

item.title: Claude Cowork 如何把营销运营从手工作坊变成可审计流水线
item.description: 一、引言：自动化团队，也被大量手工操作困住 原文链接：How Anthropic’s marketing operations team uses Claude Cowork to automate reporting and campaign builds 来源：Claude Blog / Anthropic · 分享者：Ian Chan、Ann
